station_address: Ioc Dealers, Navpada, Sahar Village, Airport, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
text: Had a horrible experience at this petrol pump. For two-wheelers there was no proper queue, people kept cutting in and no one was managing it. When I asked the staff about paying through the IndianOil app, the employee looked totally confused and didn’t even know the app exists. They seriously need to train their staff members.

station_address: Ioc Dealers, Navpada, Sahar Village, Airport, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
text: Fuel Station Near Me in Marol Andheri East Mumbai: Clearly visible from the main road towards Sakinaka metro station. I am regular user of this petrol station. One thing i like in this petrol station is their prompt service. CNG refilling is available for all vehicles. Wheelchair accessible parking and entrance available here.

station_address: Ioc Dealers, Navpada, Sahar Village, Airport, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
text:
Very nice place to fill petrol as it has bit less crowd and easy services👌. See the time and visit as it is on main road it might have crowd on odd times.
But One less star for location..at a major junction and causes traffic snarls. Pump should have more staff to manage queues and avoid causing nuisance to other vehicles …
